proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with higher feature_044 (per 1-SD increase) have longer mean pfs_months than patients with lower feature_044.

feature_027: univariable effect -0.800 months per 1-SD increase; p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for the strongest univariable features (feature_044, feature_027, feature_039, feature_046, feature_015, feature_037, feature_031, feature_069, feature_004, feature_062, feature_063, feature_010), higher feature_044 (per 1-SD increase) is associated with independently longer pfs_months.

After adjusting for the strongest univariable features (feature_044, feature_027, feature_039, feature_046, feature_015, feature_037, feature_031, feature_069, feature_004, feature_062, feature_063, feature_010), higher feature_027 (per 1-SD increase) is associated with independently shorter pfs_months.

After adjusting for the strongest univariable features (feature_044, feature_027, feature_039, feature_046, feature_015, feature_037, feature_031, feature_069, feature_004, feature_062, feature_063, feature_010), feature_039=1 is associated with independently shorter pfs_months than feature_039=0.

After adjusting for the strongest univariable features (feature_044, feature_027, feature_039, feature_046, feature_015, feature_037, feature_031, feature_069, feature_004, feature_062, feature_063, feature_010), feature_046=1 is associated with independently longer pfs_months than feature_046=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_044: adjusted effect 1.748 months in a 12-feature OLS model; p=<1e-16.
feature_027: adjusted effect -0.794 months in a 12-feature OLS model; p=<1e-16.
feature_039: adjusted effect -1.549 months in a 12-feature OLS model; p=<1e-16.
feature_046: adjusted effect 1.102 months in a 12-feature OLS model; p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of feature_031=1 and feature_046=1 has a more negative association with pfs_months than expected from the additive effects of feature_031 and feature_046.
